symptom_description: Compressor short cycling (`18 Hz`) on low-pressure cutout switch (`< 31 PSI`). Tech observed accelerated oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring (`Spec-854`) allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge (`-34%` loss) over past 6 months.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier (`P/N 9733-B`), and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a (`174 lbs`).
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor failing to start (`171` Amps draw). High dew point alarm (`> 93°C`) active on panel. Checked mechanical alignment and interlocks with coupled unit COMP-202 during inspection.
root_cause: Internal discharge valve reed fracture inside hermetic shell (`3.2 lbs`) causing complete loss of pumping capacity (`22.4 PSI` differential).
action_taken: Replaced failed compressor start kit (`P/N 2927-A` capacitor + relay), checked contactor tips, and verified smooth compressor running draw (`241 Amps`).
parts_used: Hard Start Capacitor Kit, Compressor Contactor 24V

symptom_description: Zero-loss drain trap displaying fault code (`drain fault 20 Hz`). Manual override button fails to discharge any condensate from separator bowl.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge (`0.24 inch` thick) clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve (`P/N 2667-X`), cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor hot to touch (`82`°C) and tripping on low suction pressure cutoff (`20.2 PSI`) during afternoon shift.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring (`Spec-461`) allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge (`-65%` loss) over past 6 months.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier (`P/N 9850-B`), and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a (`22 lbs`).
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Evaporator approach temperature expanded to `87`°C (`normal < 3°C`). Discharge line frost (`0.07 inch` buildup) indicating starved evaporator coil.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole (`0.022 inch` diameter) developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate (`pH 5.9`) accumulation.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier (`Spec-961`), evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C (`150 lbs`).
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: Refrigeration compressor tripped internal thermal overload switch. Hermetic shell burning hot (`105`°C) with zero cooling output (`78%` flow).
root_cause: Liquid slugging (`73%` liquid refrigerant return) destroyed scroll compressor involute plates during abrupt hot gas bypass failure.
action_taken: Cut out failed compressor shell, flushed system of acidic burnout oil (`P/N 3720-C` solvent), installed suction filter drier, brazed new scroll (`P/N 8146-REV2`), and charged (`169 lbs`).
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Core, Burnout Cleanup Filter, RX-11 Flush Solvent (1 Can), R-407C (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Zero-loss drain trap displaying fault code (`drain fault 47 Hz`). Manual override button fails to discharge any condensate from separator bowl.
root_cause: Solenoid coil burnout (`230V` supply spike) on automatic condensate drain valve (`open circuit` measured across coil terminals).
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil (`Spec-928`) and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown (`14 PSI`).
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: Liquid water blowing down downstream compressed air lines (`minor` moisture in plant header). Dryer automatic drain valve silent (`42 Hz`).
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge (`0.13 inch` thick) clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve (`P/N 4712-REV2`), cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Megger test of compressor windings shows dead short to ground (`0.40 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance). Distinct persistent electrical burn smell from terminal box.
root_cause: Single-phasing or severe voltage dip (`49%` drop on `460V +/- 4%` feed) damaged hermetic compressor start winding over `40847` hours.
action_taken: Replaced internal hermetic refrigeration compressor assembly (`Spec-890`), installed new suction/liquid line filter driers (`Spec-823`), pulled deep vacuum, and recharged system (`141 lbs`).
parts_used: Hermetic Scroll Compressor Unit, Liquid Line Drier, R-407C Refrigerant (8 lbs)

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.04 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base. Also inspected COMP-202 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Control board failure inside electronic drain trap housing (`480V +/- 3%` component burnout) stopped firing the discharge solenoid valve.
action_taken: Replaced failed zero-loss drain control module (`P/N 8650-B`), cleaned internal capacitance sensor probes (`0.006 gap`), and verified auto-discharge.
parts_used: Drain Trap Control Module PCB, Capacitance Probe Cleaning Pad

symptom_description: Zero-loss drain trap displaying fault code (`drain fault 26 Hz`). Manual override button fails to discharge any condensate from separator bowl. Unit overdrawing current when COMP-202 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Winter freeze-up (`ambient < 0°C`) of condensate drain discharge line (`8.2 ft` run) caused ice blockage, backing up water into separator.
action_taken: Thawed frozen discharge line with heat gun, installed self-regulating heat trace cable (`Spec-167`) over `3.4 ft` run, and insulated drain piping.
parts_used: Heat Trace Cable Kit (10ft), Pipe Insulation, Zip Ties

symptom_description: Liquid water blowing down downstream compressed air lines (`noticeable` moisture in plant header). Dryer automatic drain valve silent (`21 Hz`).
root_cause: Solenoid coil burnout (`460V +/- 1%` supply spike) on automatic condensate drain valve (`open circuit` measured across coil terminals).
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil (`P/N 8250-B`) and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown (`44 PSI`).
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: Water sight level glass on moisture separator bowl completely full of liquid (`55%` capacity). Electronic drain solenoid clicking but no water discharging.
root_cause: Winter freeze-up (`ambient < 0°C`) of condensate drain discharge line (`3.9 ft` run) caused ice blockage, backing up water into separator.
action_taken: Thawed frozen discharge line with heat gun, installed self-regulating heat trace cable (`Spec-625`) over `1.6 ft` run, and insulated drain piping.
parts_used: Heat Trace Cable Kit (10ft), Pipe Insulation, Zip Ties

symptom_description: Megger test of compressor windings shows dead short to ground (`0.25 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance). Distinct slight electrical burn smell from terminal box. Unit overdrawing current when COMP-202 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Liquid slugging (`30%` liquid refrigerant return) destroyed scroll compressor involute plates during abrupt hot gas bypass failure.
action_taken: Cut out failed compressor shell, flushed system of acidic burnout oil (`Spec-761` solvent), installed suction filter drier, brazed new scroll (`P/N 6591-X`), and charged (`39 lbs`).
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Core, Burnout Cleanup Filter, RX-11 Flush Solvent (1 Can), R-407C (6 lbs)

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.19 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Control board failure inside electronic drain trap housing (`4160V` component burnout) stopped firing the discharge solenoid valve.
action_taken: Replaced failed zero-loss drain control module (`P/N 6366-A`), cleaned internal capacitance sensor probes (`0.014 gap`), and verified auto-discharge.
parts_used: Drain Trap Control Module PCB, Capacitance Probe Cleaning Pad

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `109`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI (`target 34 PSI`).
root_cause: Fretting wear between rubbing copper refrigerant lines (`0.08 inch` worn away) inside cabinet wore through tubing wall over `34 months`.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps (`P/N 4652-B`), pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification (`58 lbs`).
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Compressed air dew point reading normal (`108`°C) but downstream coalescing filters rapidly flooding with liquid condensate (`60%` saturation).
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles (`67 ppm`) from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap (`P/N 3424-B`) and flushed separator bowl (`286 GPM`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling (`49 Hz`) on low-pressure cutout switch (`< 61 PSI`). Tech observed unusual oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Compressor discharge line vibration (`18 Hz` frequency) work-hardened and cracked the copper stub-out at the hermetic shell weld.
action_taken: Cut out cracked discharge line section, silver-brazed new vibration loop (`P/N 4807-B`), changed liquid line drier, and pulled vacuum before recharging `20 lbs`.
parts_used: Vibration Absorber Loop 3/8", Silver Solder Kit, R-407C (5 lbs)

symptom_description: Hot gas bypass valve fully open (`54%`) but dew point remains high (`107`°C). Leak detection dye visible near condenser return bend.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring (`P/N 6245-REV2`) allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge (`-19%` loss) over past 6 months.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier (`Spec-561`), and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a (`46 lbs`).
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor hot to touch (`111`°C) and tripping on low suction pressure cutoff (`9.0 PSI`) during afternoon shift.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole (`0.014 inch` diameter) developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate (`pH 6.2`) accumulation.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier (`P/N 5397-X`), evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C (`19 lbs`).
